data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for no workflow breakage when labels change.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'No workflow breakage when labels change,' but the evidence provided does not confirm or deny its fulfillment. The linked use case outlines the need for this requirement, yet there is no evidence presented that addresses this specific requirement. As a result, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a definitive conclusion.
gaps: No evidence confirming that workflow remains intact when labels are changed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
